# ParagonNodeStat.StatName property

Human-readable stat name, derived clean-room from the `Generic_<Rarity>_<Token>` node-name convention (light CamelCase split + known-abbreviation expansion; `Generic_Magic_DamageToElite` → `"Damage to Elite"`). Non-Generic class-specific node names (e.g. `Warlock_Rare_006`) have no encoded stat token and fall back to `"Attribute <id>"`.

```csharp
public string StatName { get; set; }
```
